name: aliyun-python-sdk-kms

metadata.name: aliyun-python-sdk-kms
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: The kms module of Aliyun Python sdk.

documentation:
# aliyun-python-sdk-kms

% This is the kms module of Aliyun Python SDK.

Aliyun Python SDK is the official software development kit. It makes things easy to integrate your Python application, library, or script with Aliyun services.

This module works on Python versions:

2.6.5 and greater

**Documentation:**

Please visit [http://develop.aliyun.com/sdk/python](http://develop.aliyun.com/sdk/python)
